'''Red Bush Grove''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] village several days' travel south of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].

==History==
All of its denizens, minus [[Leektar/Legends|Leektar]] and [[Keoulkeech]], were killed in a devastating fire that was the result of a lightning storm. The fire occurred some time before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and destroyed the entire village.

==Behind the scenes==
Red Bush Grove was a location developed by [[Arthur Papadam]] as part of [[Leektar/Legends|Leektar's]] ''[[What's The Story?]]'' entry.
